race.description: The Valley @ Southside Cranbourne Maiden Plate
race.comment: BALANCE (7) will be deservedly short in betting. She was well fancied by the sharp yard on debut in the G3 Peter Le Grand Stakes behind a good one in Alpha Sophie, running well without threatening. That's a much higher level than these and back to maiden grade should see her getting the job done. CARRIEDO (8) found the line well fresh at Kyneton, getting to within a length there having also run well on debut last time in. Fitter now and sets up well from the gate. SALARAE (6) was well backed on debut at Pakenham and ran a solid race in fourth, albeit beaten 5.5 lengths. She can improve off that. SEE SEE MAGIC (5) is a colt by Yes Yes Yes on debut for the Ed Cummings yard. He's trialled fairly well in NSW and is worth keeping an eye on betting. JUVENAL (4) was solid on debut at Port Macquarie and has minor claims with improvement.
